title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 529.050 - Issues to be tried, in what court
text:
529.050.  Issues to be tried, in what court. — If any issue shall be joined upon such proceedings, the person suing out such writ shall try the same in the court from which such writ of mandamus issued.
(RSMo 1939 § 1700) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1536; 1919 § 1986; 1909 § 2550
